summary: iter193 comprehensive testing complete. All 31 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend fully verified: (1) ReleaseNotesBanner visible on Home with dismiss functionality working, (2) FinanceTiles visible for manager role showing Food Cost, Labor, Prime Cost with targets, (3) HiringDrawer opens from More tab showing 2 batches with candidate cards and all 4 decision buttons (Advance/Phone Screen/Hold/Decline).

ui_bugs.issue: Echo ⌘K button overlay intercepts clicks on tab bar in mobile view
ui_bugs.workaround: Use JavaScript click or force=True to bypass

critical_code_review_comments: All iter193 features implemented correctly and working
Hiring mobile endpoints properly role-gated (manager/owner only)
Feature flags bucketing is stable per bucket_key using sha1 hash
Migration runner is idempotent (second run seeds 0 new flags)
Release notes dismiss persists per staff token
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_iter193_General briefing token for role gating tests, created test feature flags (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter193 fully tested. Features: (1) Mobile Build 4 - Hiring endpoints at /api/staff-mobile/hiring/* (batches, batch/{id}, decision, decisions/{batch_id}) - all role-gated to manager/owner. Finance rollup at /api/staff-mobile/finance/rollup?days=N - role-gated to salary/manager/owner. Returns tiles (revenue, food_cost, labor, prime_cost) with pct_of_revenue and targets. (2) FM-Upgrade 0 - Feature flags at /api/flags (admin CRUD) and /api/flags/public?bucket=X (public resolver). Bucketing uses sha1(bucket_key+':'+name) % 100 < rollout_pct. allow_list/deny_list override enabled/rollout. Migration runner at backend/migrations/run_migration.py --list or <migration_id>. Seed migration 20260220_seed_fm_flags is idempotent. Release notes at /api/release-notes (admin CRUD + publish/unpublish) and /api/release-notes/unread + /{id}/dismiss (staff). (3) Frontend - StaffMobile at /m/staff/:token shows ReleaseNotesBanner (dismissable), FinanceTiles (for salary+), HiringDrawer (for managers via More tab). MOCKED: FCM/APNs push (queued when keys absent), Twilio SMS, Resend emails.
